key.name: topbar-enabled
key.summary: Enable the Gnoblin layer-shell top bar
key.description: Controls whether GNOME Shell autostarts the Gnoblin top bar layer-shell client and whether the client maps any top bar surfaces.

key.name: topbar-monitor-mode
key.description: Which monitors should show the Gnoblin top bar. Supported values are "primary", "all", and "manual". In manual mode, topbar-monitors holds the enabled monitor connector ids.

key.name: topbar-monitors
key.summary: Monitors that show the top bar in manual mode
key.description: Monitor connector ids that should show the Gnoblin top bar when topbar-monitor-mode is "manual".

key.name: dock-enabled
key.description: Controls whether GNOME Shell autostarts the Gnoblin dock layer-shell client and whether the client maps any dock surfaces.

key.name: dock-monitor-mode
key.description: Which monitors should show the Gnoblin dock. Supported values are "primary", "all", and "manual". In manual mode, dock-monitors holds the enabled monitor connector ids.

key.name: dock-monitors
key.summary: Monitors that show the dock in manual mode
key.description: Monitor connector ids that should show the Gnoblin dock when dock-monitor-mode is "manual".

key.name: wlr-layer-shell-enabled
key.description: Controls whether Mutter advertises the wlr-layer-shell protocol at compositor startup. Changing this setting requires restarting GNOME Shell.

key.name: wlr-screencopy-enabled
key.description: Controls whether Mutter advertises the wlr-screencopy protocol at compositor startup. Changing this setting requires restarting GNOME Shell.
